auth_description:
Cookie chain for the four bundled member publishers (set via
`auth login --chrome --service <huberman|acquired|founders|peterattia>`),
plus optional api_key vars for paid fallbacks. No credential required for the
free Dwarkesh / RSS / yt-dlp tier — that's the default dispatch.

novel_features.name: Topic bundle for one-shot agent runs
novel_features.description: Bundle top-N cached transcripts about a topic into one markdown file an agent can summarize in a single call.

novel_features.name: Dispatcher decision trace
novel_features.description: Dry-run shows which source tier will fire and why earlier tiers were skipped, with projected cost before any paid call.

novel_features.name: Local quote grep with speaker context
novel_features.description: FTS5 phrase search returns the matched segment plus N surrounding segments preserving the canonical speaker shape and deeplink timestamp.

novel_features.name: Cross-source content diff
novel_features.description: For an episode resolvable on multiple sources, fetch all available adapters and diff segment count, token count, distinct speakers, label confidence.

novel_features.name: Bilingual zh-Hans + en aligned transcript
novel_features.description: yt-dlp dual-language auto-subs, greedy nearest-neighbor alignment, emits one markdown file with paired Chinese + auto-translated English per turn.

novel_features.name: Per-service cookie freshness table
novel_features.description: One-row-per-service table of cookie age, expiry, last-fetch result, with remediation hint when stale.

novel_features.name: Distinct-speaker corpus index
novel_features.description: Aggregate speaker names across the cached corpus with episode counts, optionally filtered by show.

novel_features.name: Spend pivot by show + provider
novel_features.description: Pivot spend.jsonl joined to episodes by URL; group by show, provider, month to attribute cost.
